sentences.translation: Nadija je sjela s ocem u kafiću.
sentences.translationEn: Nadia sat with her father in the café.

sentences.translation: Naručili su kafu, sok i mali kolač.
sentences.translationEn: They ordered coffee, juice, and a small cake.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا جَاءَ الحِسَابُ نَظَرَ الأَبُ فِيهِ.
sentences.translation: Kad je stigao račun, otac ga je pogledao.
sentences.translationEn: When the bill came, the father looked at it.

sentences.arabic: دَفَعَ المَبْلَغَ كَامِلًا وَتَرَكَ بَقْشِيشًا لِلنَّادِلِ.
sentences.translation: Platio je cijeli iznos i ostavio napojnicu konobaru.
sentences.translationEn: He paid the full amount and left a tip for the waiter.
